title: Manufacturer geometry thresholds need DRC confirmation

evidence.description: Board clearance, trace width, hole and edge rules matched to manufacturer profile

message: Manufacturer geometry thresholds need human confirmation against the selected profile.
recommendation: Verify KiCad board setup and DRC constraints match the intended manufacturer capability.
falsePositiveNotes: Waive when profile-matched DRC configuration is committed and reviewed.
impact: A board can pass generic DRC while failing manufacturer-specific capabilities.

title: Bring-up test point coverage needs review

evidence.description: Power rails, programming pins and key interfaces have accessible test points

message: Test point coverage needs human review.
recommendation: Check power rails, reset, boot, debug and high-risk interfaces for bring-up access.
falsePositiveNotes: Waive for boards where bring-up access is provided through connectors or fixtures.
impact: Debug and first-article bring-up may become slower or require rework.

title: Silkscreen and polarity markers need review

evidence.description: Polarity, pin-1 and orientation markings are present and not obscured

message: Silkscreen and polarity markings need human review.
recommendation: Inspect connector direction, diode/LED/capacitor polarity and pin-1 marks before release.
falsePositiveNotes: Waive when assembly drawing or mechanical constraints make orientation unambiguous.
impact: Manual assembly and human review can miss orientation-sensitive mistakes.

title: KiCad DRC output is available for board-level findings

evidence.description: KiCad board source file used for DRC execution and normalization

message: No KiCad board file was found for DRC-backed PCB review.
recommendation: Provide `.kicad_pcb` when board-level DRC interpretation is expected.
falsePositiveNotes: Waive for manufacturing-package-only review where raw Gerbers are the only input.
impact: Copper, clearance and unconnected-net risks cannot be tied back to KiCad DRC evidence.

title: Via and drill thresholds need profile review

evidence.description: Via diameter, drill diameter and annular ring thresholds match manufacturer profile

message: Via and drill thresholds need human review.
recommendation: Confirm minimum drill, annular ring and via settings against the selected manufacturer profile.
falsePositiveNotes: Waive when profile-specific DRC settings already enforce these constraints.
impact: A prototype can pass local checks but fail fabrication capability review.
